intro: 8 medium problems that drill the Segment Tree pattern — ideal for focused practice sessions.

faqs.question: Why practice medium Segment Tree problems?
faqs.answer: Difficulty-scoped drills lock the pattern before you mix constraints on harder variants.

seo.title: Medium Segment Tree Problems | AlgoForge
